title: Wrinkled Korean Chicken Tagine
description: A jammy, glassy-jelly chicken tagine featuring hoisin sauce and sugar-free-friendly. This dish is a crowd-pleaser and suitable for dinner.
instructions: Season chicken with salt and red pepper flakes if using.
Place chicken in a tagine pot and pour soy sauce over it. Cover the pot with a lid.
Bake for 25 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through and has a glassy, wrinkle-like texture.
Stir together cornstarch and hoisin sauce in a small bowl to form a slurry.
Pour the mixture into the pot, stirring quickly to coat the chicken evenly. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Serve hot with steamed vegetables or jasmine rice.
